lane: Lane B / AI publishability and generated asset context
public_example_boundary: Seedream / BytePlus are public model/tool context examples only. They are not VULCA customers, partners, endorsers, authorization sources, or audit targets.

local_sources.use: Internal proof of public model surface and API/try route. Customer-facing copy must stay version-neutral unless a specific model version is selected later.
Internal proof of model registry/category context. Contains cookie overlay and should be recaptured or redrawn before external use.
Internal proof of prompt/reference, region/API, and input-mode context. Contains cookie overlay and should be recaptured or redrawn before external use.
Internal proof of model page, input/output row, and output-context fields. Contains cookie overlay and should be recaptured or redrawn before external use.

generated_artifacts.role: internal field overlay showing how true source screenshots are read into VULCA publishability fields
customer-facing candidate distilled from the internal proof; contains no raw UI screenshots

vulca_fields.meaning: Official URL, page role, source owner, source type, and capture metadata.
Model family, registry/category, tutorial surface, and version-neutral customer copy.
Prompt, reference, product/source material, region/API route, and missing input packet.
Generated state, output format, demo/export state, and prompt-result pairing needs.
Visible AI label, internal mark, channel disclosure, or no-label owner decision.
Product, platform, creative, or release owner receives unresolved questions.

customer_facing_use: Use the source-safe distilled card or a redrawn docs strip to explain the workflow. Do not export raw UI screenshots by default.
must_not_claim: Seedream, BytePlus, ByteDance, or ModelArk is a VULCA customer, partner, endorser, or authorization source.
VULCA certifies model quality, model safety, copyright clearance, legal approval, platform-policy compliance, benchmark superiority, or release readiness.
A specific model version is the customer-facing recommendation unless explicitly selected later.
The source pages prove a generated asset is safe to publish without human owner review.
